title: Agent Search Engine — The Index of the Agent Era
excerpt: Discover and compare verified AI agents, MCP servers, frameworks, and agent infrastructure.
content_html:
The signal observatory · 247 live records

Agent
Search
Engine

scroll to trace the ecosystem ↓

A technical index for choosing agents, MCP servers, frameworks, and the infrastructure underneath them. Ranked by maintained adoption — never by sponsorship.

11 system classes · 151 active this month

Field readout · live

247

verified records

11

system classes

3.4M

stars under watch

151

active this month

01 · Navigate the field

Not a directory. An atlas of the agent economy.

Every territory is a distinct product class, not a search-keyword bucket. Each record carries exactly one type — how we classify.

02 · Independent index

Records that answer a decision.

Every record is built to help someone decide, not merely discover. Open one to see where it fits, where it fails, and what to compare.

Sponsored

Paid placement — never affects the index

Most adopted · open source

By maintained adoption

03 · Signal marketplace

For serious agent products that want visible, clearly labeled placement in front of developers and technical buyers actively comparing tools.

Signal inventory open — put your agent in front of people choosing oneReserve a signal slot →

本月活跃

01 · 驾驭领域

不是目录。 代理经济地图集。

每个领域都是一个独特的产品类别，而不是一个搜索关键字桶。 每条记录都只包含一种类型——我们如何分类。

02·独立索引

回答决定的记录。

每条记录的建立都是为了帮助人们做出决定，而不仅仅是发现。 打开一个，看看哪里适合，哪里不适合，以及要比较什么。

赞助

付费安置——永远不会影响指数

最受采用·开源

通过维持采用

03·信号市场

对于需要在开发人员和技术买家面前进行可见、清晰标记的严肃代理产品，积极比较工具。
